title: 2026 FIFA World Cup Trivia
description: 100+ trivia questions about the 2026 FIFA World Cup (Canada/Mexico/USA), covering players, teams, host venues, and tournament details. Sourced from live tournament coverage through the July 15, 2026 semifinals. Ordered from easiest to hardest.
current_through: Semifinals complete (Spain 2-0 France; Argentina 2-1 England). Final: Argentina vs Spain, July 19, 2026 — not yet played.
image_note: photo_link/answer_photo values are national flag images from the free flagcdn.com CDN, used as generic theme photos as permitted by the request. Swap in specific action photos/headshots if you'd like more bespoke images.

questions.question: How many national teams competed in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
Which three countries co-hosted the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
What is the name of the official 2026 World Cup match ball?
Which Argentine superstar captained his team to the 2026 World Cup final?
In which New Jersey stadium is the 2026 World Cup final being played?
Which nation entered the 2026 World Cup as the defending champion?
On what date is the 2026 FIFA World Cup final scheduled?
Which Portuguese icon confirmed the 2026 tournament as his last World Cup?
How many host cities were used across the three 2026 World Cup countries?
Which country hosted the 2026 World Cup's opening match?
How many groups were the 48 teams divided into during the group stage?
Which 19-year-old Spanish winger became one of the breakout stars of the 2026 World Cup?
Which host nation was co-hosting a World Cup for the very first time in its history?
'Clutch' the Bald Eagle is the official mascot representing which host nation?
Which Norwegian striker finished among the tournament's top scorers despite his team's quarterfinal exit?
Estadio Azteca, the opening-match venue, is located in which city?
'Maple' the Moose is the official mascot of which 2026 host nation?
How many total matches were scheduled to be played at the 2026 World Cup?
Which England midfielder scored two goals in the Round of 16 win over Mexico, then two more in the quarterfinal win over Norway?
Which two nations are contesting the 2026 World Cup final?
Which four nations made their FIFA World Cup debut in 2026?
questions.answer: Cape Verde, Curaçao, Jordan and Uzbekistan
wrong_answers: Cape Verde, Panama, Jordan and Ghana
Cape Verde, Curaçao, Tunisia and Jordan

questions.answer: MetLife Stadium (New York New Jersey Stadium)

questions.question: Lionel Messi's early scoring burst in 2026 pushed him past whose long-standing record for career World Cup goals?

How many kilograms does the solid-gold FIFA World Cup Trophy weigh?

Mexico's win over South Africa in the 2026 opener finally ended a long personal drought. How many previous World Cup openers had Mexico lost before 2026?
wrong_answers: None — they had never lost an opener before

questions.question: South Korea's Hong Myung-bo suffered a group-stage exit in 2026 that echoed an earlier failure. In which prior World Cup did that first happen?
Which Argentine goalkeeper combined with Lisandro Martínez to deny Breel Embolo a clear shot in the quarterfinal, before starting the semifinal shutout of England's first half?

The current FIFA World Cup Trophy, awarded since 1974, is made of which materials?
wrong_answers: Gold-plated sterling silver with a lapis lazuli base
Solid platinum with a marble base
